title: Copper Golem Extension (CGE)
description: Make Copper Golems fill your shulkers and barrels too!
body:
[ ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebcbbd9f1c108f67e2110b14170753af5b0395e1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
[![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c833d5d7e59938f60a6159c0a66f20ed9b8ce78_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/echolib)


## What does this Mod do?

This mod extends the functionality of Minecraft's copper golems by allowing players to set container preferences. Instead of only depositing items into regular chests, your copper golems can now target shulker boxes, barrels, or any available container based on your preferences.

## Added Commands:

- /coppergolem config (opens Config-GUI) (only clientside!)
- /coppergolem prefer shulker/barrel/chest/any/status 
- /coppergolem admin disable/enable/status (requires OP)
- /coppergolem vanilla (sets behavior to vanilla)
- /coppergolem range (shows current range)
- /coppergolem sethight low/normal/high/extreme (sets the distance for searching)
- /coppergolem setrange low/normal/high/extreme (sets the distance for depositing)
